overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring towering neon-lit skyscrapers, massive holographic fish displays, and futuristic vehicles. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, showcasing a dense urban environment with reflective wet pavement and vibrant artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into the open rainy plaza with increased neon illumination
camera tilts upward to view the towering skyscrapers and holographic displays above

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass while observing the large orange holographic fish display ahead

entered.detail: concrete and metal overpass providing shelter from the rain
giant glowing orange holographic fish swimming in the air
tall skyscraper with prominent yellow neon edge lighting
towering building covered in vertical colorful neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass in a rain-soaked cyberpunk city. The camera moves forward from the sheltered walkway into an open plaza, revealing towering glass skyscrapers illuminated with vibrant neon lights. A massive orange holographic fish floats in the air ahead, while the wet pavement reflects the surrounding artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with giant holographic displays

events.description: blue holographic fish materializes in the sky next to the orange fish
camera pans right to track the movement of the holographic fish displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza while looking up at the towering holographic fish and neon skyscrapers

entered.detail: giant glowing blue holographic fish with flowing fins swimming in the air
futuristic elevated train track with pink and blue neon lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: Moving into a wide-open plaza, the scene reveals two massive holographic fish—one orange and one blue—swimming through the air between towering skyscrapers. The camera pans upward to take in the scale of the neon-lit buildings while an elevated transit line with glowing pink lights becomes visible on the right. The rain continues to fall on the reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with illuminated palm tree planters

events.description: moving from open plaza to street-level walkway lined with palm trees
camera tilts down to focus on illuminated tree planters with embedded lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the street level passing palm trees with illuminated planters while looking down at the wet ground

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the pedestrian walkway
square planters with grass and bright white embedded lighting around tree bases

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a street-level pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees set in illuminated planters. The camera focuses downward on the glowing tree bases and rain-slicked pavement while the holographic fish remain visible in the distant background. The elevated transit line runs parallel on the right side with its neon lights reflecting off the wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with elevated transit line and moving traffic

events.description: futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet road with neon reflections
camera turns left following the curve of the street alongside traffic

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the roadway observing passing vehicles and neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the wet asphalt with neon underglow and reflections

entered.detail: sleek cyberpunk-style cars with neon lighting driving on the wet road
colorful vertical neon billboards on building facades at street level

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the curve of a city street alongside moving traffic. Futuristic vehicles with neon underglow drive past on the rain-slicked asphalt while the elevated transit line continues parallel on the right. The camera turns left, revealing more street-level neon signage as the holographic fish fade into the distance behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban underpass into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza and along a rain-slicked city street. It begins by moving from beneath a concrete overpass into an open square, where the view expands to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and a massive orange holographic fish floating above reflective pavement. As the camera pans upward to capture the scale of the architecture, a second blue holographic fish appears alongside a glowing pink elevated transit line that stretches into the distance. The scene then shifts toward a pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees in illuminated planters, focusing on the glow of the bases and the rain-slicked ground before the transit line continues to run parallel on the right. Finally, the camera follows the curve of the street past futuristic vehicles with neon underglow, turning left toward vibrant street-level signage as the holographic fish fade into the background.
